info.name: PaoPizza API
info.description:
Backend API for PaoPizza.

Base path: `/api/v1`

**Active modules**: auth (including changePassword), users, customers, employees, cart, supplier (CRUD + categories), ingredient (CRUD + active/soft-delete)

**Stub modules (model only, no routes yet)**: order, inventory, promotion, payroll, schedule, shift, category, product, store

**Auth**: Passport.js Local + JWT (Bearer token) + Change Password

**Seed credentials** (password: `12345678`):
- `admin_q1` (admin/Employee)
- `manager_q1` (manager/Employee)
- `cashier_hk`, `kitchen_tan`, `staff_lan`, `delivery_nam` (staff/Employee)
- `customer_a`, `customer_b`, `customer_c`, `customer_d` (Customer)

**Rate limit**: 100 requests per 15 minutes

**Note**: Change Password requires valid JWT Bearer token in Authorization header. Do not send user_id in body.

request.description:
Basic service health endpoint.

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "status": "OK",
  "timestamp": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
}
```

item.name: Auth
item.description:
Authentication endpoints using Passport.js.

- **Local strategy**: username/password login
- **JWT strategy**: Bearer token from `Authorization` header
- **Refresh token**: stored in httpOnly cookie (`refreshToken`)
- **Access token**: expires in 1 day
- **Refresh token**: expires in 7 days

request.description:
Login for Employee accounts via Passport local strategy.

Will reject if `user_type` is `Customer`.

**Body**:
| Field | Type | Required |
|-------|------|----------|
| username | string | Yes |
| password | string | Yes |

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "message": "Đăng nhập thành công",
  "accessToken": "JWT string",
  "user": { "id": "...", "email": "...", "role": "admin" }
}
```
+ Sets `refreshToken` httpOnly cookie (7 days)

**Response 403**: `{ "message": "Vui lòng đăng nhập bằng tài khoản nhân viên !" }`
**Response 401**: Passport authentication failed

response.name: 403 - Wrong User Type

request.description:
Login for Customer accounts via Passport local strategy.

Will reject if `user_type` is `Employee`.

**Body**:
| Field | Type | Required |
|-------|------|----------|
| username | string | Yes |
| password | string | Yes |

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "message": "Đăng nhập thành công",
  "accessToken": "JWT string",
  "user": { "id": "...", "email": "...", "role": null }
}
```
+ Sets `refreshToken` httpOnly cookie (7 days)

**Response 403**: `{ "message": "Vui lòng đăng nhập bằng tài khoản khách hàng !" }`
**Response 401**: Passport authentication failed

response.name: 403 - Wrong User Type

request.description:
Refresh the access token using the `refreshToken` httpOnly cookie.

Postman cookie jar should keep the cookie after login.

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "accessToken": "new JWT string"
}
```
+ Sets new `refreshToken` httpOnly cookie

**Response 401**: `{ "message": "Không tìm thấy Refresh Token" }`
**Response 403**: `{ "message": "<error message>" }` (clears cookie)

Clears the `refreshToken` httpOnly cookie.

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "message": "Đăng xuất thành công"
}
```

Change authenticated user's password.
Requires valid JWT token.

**Headers**:
- Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}

**Body**:
- oldPass: current password
- newPass: new password (min 6 chars)

**Note**: Uses req.user.id from JWT, do not send user_id.

response.name: 200 - Success

item.name: Users
item.description:
User account management.

- Create, update, and query user accounts
- `Create`, `Get All`, and `Update Status` require **admin** role (JWT + admin)
- `Get By Id` and `Update` are currently **public** (no auth middleware)

request.description:
Create a new user account. **Requires JWT + admin role.**

**Body**:
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| username | string | Yes | unique, min 3 chars |
| password | string | Yes | min 6 chars |
| user_type | string | Yes | `Employee` or `Customer` |
| role | string | Yes for Employee | `admin`, `manager`, `staff` (null for Customer) |
| ref_id | ObjectId | Yes | Reference to Employee or Customer document |
| status | boolean | No | default: true |

**Response 201**:
```json
{
  "message": "Tạo tài khoản thành công",
  "data": { ...user without password }
}
```

**Response 400**: `{ "message": "<validation error>" }`

Get all user accounts with `ref_id` populated. **Requires JWT + admin role.**

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "username": "admin_q1",
      "user_type": "Employee",
      "role": "admin",
      "ref_id": { ...populated employee/customer },
      "status": true
    }
  ]
}
```

**Response 500**: `{ "message": "Lỗi server khi lấy danh sách tài khoản" }`

Toggle user active/inactive status. **Requires JWT + admin role.**

**Params**: `id` - MongoDB ObjectId

**Body**:
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| status | boolean | Yes | `true` or `false` only |

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "message": "Cập nhật trạng thái thành công",
  "data": { ...updated user }
}
```

**Response 400**: `{ "message": "Trạng thái không hợp lệ" }`

response.name: 200 - Status Updated

request.description:
Update user fields (except password). **Currently public (no auth middleware).**

**Params**: `id` - MongoDB ObjectId

**Body** (any user fields except `password`):
| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| username | string | unique check applied |
| role | string | `admin`, `manager`, `staff` |
| status | boolean | |
| user_type | string | `Employee`, `Customer` |

**Note**: `password` field is stripped from the request body.

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "message": "Cập nhật thông tin tài khoản thành công",
  "data": { ...updated user without password }
}
```

**Response 400**: `{ "message": "<error message>" }`

response.name: 200 - Updated

item.name: Customers
item.description:
Customer registration.

Creates both a `Customer` profile and a `User` account with `user_type: Customer`.

body.raw:
{
  "username": "customer_new",
  "password": "12345678",
  "name": "Nguyen Van A",
  "phone": "0900000001",
  "address": "123 Le Loi, Q1, HCM",
  "email": "newcustomer@example.com"
}

request.description:
Register a new customer account. **Public endpoint.**

Creates a `Customer` document first, then a `User` account linked to it. Rolls back Customer if User creation fails.

**Body**:
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| username | string | Yes | unique |
| password | string | Yes | min 6 chars |
| name | string | Yes | display name |
| phone | string | No | unique if provided |
| address | string | No | |
| email | string | No | unique, lowercase |

**Response 201**:
```json
{
  "message": "Đăng ký tài khoản khách hàng thành công",
  "data": {
    "account": { ...user without password },
    "profile": { ...customer object }
  }
}
```

**Response 400**: `{ "message": "Vui lòng điền đầy đủ Tên đăng nhập, Mật khẩu và Tên hiển thị" }`

response.name: 201 - Registered
400 - Missing Fields

item.name: Employees
item.description:
Employee management.

Creates both an `Employee` profile and a `User` account with `user_type: Employee`.

Uses **Zod** validation with `.strict()` mode (no extra fields allowed).

body.raw:
{
  "username": "newstaff02",
  "password": "12345678",
  "store_id": "{{storeId}}",
  "name": "Tran Van B",
  "birthday": "1995-05-15",
  "email": "newstaff02@paopizza.com",
  "phone": "0900123456",
  "station": "cashier",
  "salary_type": "hourly",
  "role": "staff",
  "address": "456 Nguyen Hue, Q1, HCM",
  "salary": 30000
}

request.description:
Create a new employee with user account. Route has no auth middleware currently but logically requires admin.

Uses Zod `.strict()` validation - **no extra fields allowed**.

**Body** (Zod validated):
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| username | string | Yes | min 3, max 30 |
| password | string | Yes | min 6 |
| store_id | string | Yes | MongoDB ObjectId as string |
| name | string | Yes | min 2, max 100 |
| birthday | date string | Yes | must be in the past |
| email | string | Yes | valid email |
| phone | string | Yes | regex `/^[0-9]{10,11}$/` |
| station | enum | Yes | `manager`, `cashier`, `kitchen`, `delivery`, `barista` |
| salary_type | enum | No | `hourly`, `monthly` (default: `hourly`) |
| role | enum | No | `admin`, `manager`, `staff` (default: `staff`) |
| address | string | No | |
| salary | number | No | min 0 |

**Response 201**:
```json
{
  "message": "Tạo nhân viên thành công",
  "data": {
    "account": { ...user without password },
    "profile": { ...employee object }
  }
}
```

**Response 400 (Zod)**:
```json
{
  "message": "Validation error",
  "errors": [
    { "field": "phone", "message": "Số điện thoại phải có 10-11 chữ số" }
  ]
}
```

response.name: 201 - Created
400 - Validation Error

item.name: Cart
item.description:
Shopping cart management.

No auth middleware applied currently. Cart is identified by `user_id`.

request.description:
Add an item to the cart. If item with same `product_id` + `size` exists, quantity is incremented. **Currently public (no auth middleware).**

**Body**:
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| userId | string | Yes | User ObjectId |
| product_id | string | Yes | Product ObjectId |
| size | string | Yes | Must match a product variant size (case-insensitive) |
| quantity | number | No | default: 1, min: 1 |
| note | string | No | default: '' |

**Response 200** (cart with populated items):
```json
{
  "result": {
    "_id": "...",
    "user_id": "...",
    "items": [
      {
        "product_id": {
          "_id": "...",
          "name": "Pizza Margherita",
          "images": [...],
          "price": 50000
        },
        "price": 55000,
        "size": "M",
        "quantity": 1,
        "note": "Ít đá"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

**Errors**: Throws if `product_id`/`size` missing, quantity < 1, or size doesn't exist for product.

item.name: Supplier
item.description:
Supplier management.

Full CRUD + category enums.
Requires JWT + admin for most ops (categories only needs auth).

request.description:
Get list of supplier categories/enums.

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "supplier_category": ["main_ingredient", "drink", "seafood", "vegetable"]
}
```

Tạo nhà cung cấp mới. **Yêu cầu JWT + admin.**

Body fields: name, email, phone, supplier_category, ingredients (array of {ingredient: ObjectId})

Test script auto-sets supplierId variable from response.data._id

response.name: 200 - Success

request.description: Cập nhật thông tin nhà cung cấp (supplier_id trong body). **Yêu cầu admin.** Có thể cập nhật ingredients array (now {ingredient: ObjectId}).

response.name: 200 - Success

request.description:
Lấy tất cả nhà cung cấp. **Yêu cầu JWT + admin.**

**Response**:
```json
{
  "data": [array of suppliers]
}
```
Lấy chi tiết nhà cung cấp theo ID. **Yêu cầu JWT + admin.**
Soft delete (set isDeleted=true, isActive=false). **Yêu cầu JWT + admin.**

item.name: Ingredient
item.description:
Ingredient management.

Requires JWT; most ops need admin. Uses similar patterns to Supplier.

request.description: Get all ingredients (auth required).
Get single ingredient by ID (auth required).

Create new ingredient. **Yêu cầu JWT + admin.**

Body: name, unit, category. Test script sets ingredientId var.
Update ingredient (ingredient_id in body). **Yêu cầu admin.**
Update active status for ingredient.
Soft delete ingredient (set isDeleted=true). **Yêu cầu admin.**

variable.description: Base URL for all API requests
JWT access token (auto-set by login test scripts)
Current user ID (auto-set by login test scripts)
User ID for cart operations (auto-set by Customer Login)
Employee document ID for user creation
Supplier ID (auto-set by Create Supplier test script)
Ingredient ID (auto-set by Create Ingredient test script)
